=== Read Operations

[[jjdo_validate]]
// ‚ü¶axl_voices axi_cli_subcommand‚üß
==== {jjdo_validate}

Check that
{jjdgr_gallops}
JSON conforms to schema.

{jjds_arguments}

// ‚ü¶axd_optional axd_defaulted‚üß
* {jjda_file}

{jjds_stdout} None

{jjds_exit_uniform} 0 success, non-zero error.

*Validation Rules:*

. Root must be JSON object with
{jjdgm_seed}
(2 URL-safe base64 characters matching `[A-Za-z0-9_-]{2}`)
. Root must have `heats` object
. Each
{jjdhr_heat}
key must match `‚Ç£[A-Za-z0-9_-]{2}`
. Each
{jjdhr_heat}
must have:
{jjdhm_silks}
(non-empty kebab-case),
{jjdhm_created}
(YYMMDD),
{jjdhm_status}
({jjdhe_current}
or
{jjdhe_retired}),
{jjdhm_order}
(array),
{jjdhm_seed}
(3 URL-safe base64 characters matching `[A-Za-z0-9_-]{3}`),
`paces` (object)
. {jjdhm_order}
array and `paces` object must have identical key sets
. Each
{jjdpr_pace}
key must match `‚Ç¢[A-Za-z0-9_-]{5}` and embed parent
{jjdhr_heat}
identity (first 2 base64 chars after prefix)
. Each
{jjdpr_pace}
must have:
{jjdpm_silks}
(non-empty kebab-case),
`tacks` (non-empty array)
. Each
{jjdkr_tack}
must have:
{jjdkm_refined}
(YYMMDD-HHMM),
{jjdkm_state}
({jjdpe_rough},
{jjdpe_primed},
{jjdpe_complete},
or
{jjdpe_abandoned}),
{jjdkm_text}
(non-empty string)
. If
{jjdkm_state}
is
{jjdpe_primed},
{jjdkm_direction}
must be present (non-empty string); otherwise
{jjdkm_direction}
must be absent

----

  "heat_silks": "...",

}

Fields `pace_coronet` through `tack_direction` are absent if no actionable pace exists.
Field `tack_direction` is present only when `pace_state` is
{jjdpe_primed}.
Field `paddock_content` contains the full text of the paddock file.

{jjds_exit_uniform} 0 success, non-zero error.

. Read
{jjdgr_gallops}
from file

{jjdhm_order}

or

{jjdpe_abandoned}
and `--full` flag:
output `tack_text`
. Output JSON

=== Steeplechase Operations

The steeplechase is Job Jockey's session history, stored in git commits rather than the
{jjdgr_gallops}
JSON.
Commit messages follow patterns that
{jjdo_rein}
can parse to reconstruct session history.

==== Commit Message Patterns

*Standard commit* (created by {jjdo_notch}):
----
[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX/pace-silks] commit message

Co-Authored-By: ...
----

* `BRAND` ‚Äî repository identifier baked into arcanum at install time
* `‚Ç£XX` ‚Äî {jjdt_firemark} of the active heat
* `pace-silks` ‚Äî {jjdt_silks} of the current pace

*Steeplechase marker* (created by {jjdo_chalk}):
----
[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX/pace-silks] MARKER: description

Co-Authored-By: ...
----

* `BRAND` ‚Äî repository identifier baked into arcanum at install time
* `‚Ç£XX` ‚Äî {jjdt_firemark} of the active heat
* `pace-silks` ‚Äî {jjdt_silks} of the current pace (required for APPROACH/WRAP/FLY; optional for DISCUSSION)

Marker types:

* `APPROACH` ‚Äî proposed approach for a pace, recorded before work begins
* `WRAP` ‚Äî pace completion summary
* `FLY` ‚Äî autonomous execution began (primed pace)
* `DISCUSSION` ‚Äî significant decision or design discussion

[[jjdo_rein]]
// ‚ü¶axl_voices axi_cli_subcommand‚üß
==== {jjdo_rein}

Parse git history for steeplechase entries belonging to a
{jjdhr_heat}.

{jjds_arguments}

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* {jjdt_firemark}
(positional) ‚Äî target
{jjdhr_heat}

// ‚ü¶axd_optional‚üß
* `--limit` ‚Äî maximum entries to return (default: 50)

{jjds_stdout} JSON array of steeplechase entries:
[source,json]
----
[
  {
    "timestamp": "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM",
    "pace_silks": "...",
    "marker": null,
    "subject": "commit message"
  },
  {
    "timestamp": "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM",
    "pace_silks": null,
    "marker": "APPROACH",
    "subject": "description"
  }
]
----
Field `pace_silks` is present for standard commits, `marker` for chalk entries.
Entries ordered newest first.

{jjds_exit_uniform} 0 success, non-zero error.

{jjds_behavior}

. Run `git log --all --extended-regexp --grep="^\[jj:BRAND\]\[‚Ç£XX" --format="%ai%x09%s"`
. Parse each line: extract timestamp, determine if standard commit or marker
. For standard commits: extract pace-silks from `[‚Ç£XX/pace-silks]`
. For markers: extract marker type and description
. Build JSON array, limit to requested count
. Output JSON

[[jjdo_notch]]
// ‚ü¶axl_voices axi_cli_subcommand‚üß
==== {jjdo_notch}

Create a JJ-aware git commit with heat/pace context prefix.

{jjds_arguments}

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* {jjdt_firemark}
(positional) ‚Äî active
{jjdhr_heat}

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* `--pace` ‚Äî {jjdt_silks} of the current pace

// ‚ü¶axd_optional‚üß
* `--message` ‚Äî commit message; if absent, invoke `claude --print` to generate from diff

{jjds_stdout} Commit hash

{jjds_exit_uniform} 0 success, non-zero error.

{jjds_behavior}

. Acquire lock (`refs/vvg/locks/vvx`)
. Stage changes (`git add -u`)
. Run size guard check
. If `--message` absent:
.. Run `claude --print "Generate commit message for this diff: $(git diff --cached)"`
.. Use response as message
. Format full message: `[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX/pace-silks] message\n\nCo-Authored-By: ...`
. Run `git commit -m "..."`
. Release lock
. Output commit hash

[[jjdo_chalk]]
// ‚ü¶axl_voices axi_cli_subcommand‚üß
==== {jjdo_chalk}

Create an empty commit marking a steeplechase event.

{jjds_arguments}

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* {jjdt_firemark}
(positional) ‚Äî active
{jjdhr_heat}

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* `--marker` ‚Äî marker type: `APPROACH`, `WRAP`, `FLY`, or `DISCUSSION`

// ‚ü¶axd_conditional‚üß
* {jjda_pace}
‚Äî required for `APPROACH`, `WRAP`, and `FLY` markers; optional for `DISCUSSION`

// ‚ü¶axd_required‚üß
* `--description` ‚Äî marker description text

{jjds_stdout} Commit hash

{jjds_exit_uniform} 0 success, non-zero error.

{jjds_behavior}

. Acquire lock (`refs/vvg/locks/vvx`)
. Validate
{jjda_pace}:
required if marker is `APPROACH`, `WRAP`, or `FLY`; optional for `DISCUSSION`
. Format message:
.. If
{jjda_pace}
provided: `[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX/pace-silks] MARKER: description\n\nCo-Authored-By: ...`
.. If
{jjda_pace}
absent (DISCUSSION only): `[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX] MARKER: description\n\nCo-Authored-By: ...`
. Run `git commit --allow-empty -m "..."`
. Release lock
. Output commit hash

All edits have been successfully applied to `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/jjk/JJD-GallopsData.adoc`. Here is a summary of the changes made:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. Mapping Section (line 81)
Added the attribute reference for the new `--pace` argument:
```
:jjda_pace:           <<jjda_pace,--pace>>
```

### 2. Arguments Section (lines 602-607)
Added the new argument definition:
```asciidoc
[[jjda_pace]]
// ‚ü¶axl_voices axa_cli_option‚üß
{jjda_pace}::
Pace silks for context in commit messages.
Long: `--pace`.
Short: `-p`.
```

### 3. Commit Message Patterns Section (lines 1452-1461)
Updated the steeplechase marker pattern from:
```
[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX] MARKER: description
```
to:
```
[jj:BRAND][‚Ç£XX/pace-silks] MARKER: description
```
And added documentation that `pace-silks` is required for APPROACH/WRAP/FLY markers and optional for DISCUSSION.

### 4. jjdo_chalk Operation (lines 1555-1597)
- Added `{jjda_pace}` to the Arguments list with `// ‚ü¶axd_conditional‚üß` annotation
- Documented that it is required for `APPROACH`, `WRAP`, and `FLY` markers; optional for `DISCUSSION`
- Updated the Behavior section to:
  - Add validation step for `{jjda_pace}` based on marker type
  - Show two message format options depending on whether `{jjda_pace}` is provided

### 5. jjdo_rein Operation (lines 1487-1524)
- Updated the JSON output example to show that chalk entries can have `pace_silks`
- Added a DISCUSSION example showing null `pace_silks`
- Updated the field descriptions to clarify that `pace_silks` is present for both standard commits and chalk entries with pace context
- Updated the behavior to note that pace-silks should be extracted from markers when present
